title: gothofreda montana
intro: Gothofreda montana, also known as Montanoa tomentosa, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Gothofreda montana is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to improve heart health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Gothofreda montana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other medicinal plants to enhance their effects.
